files_to_change.change: Add crabMaxRestarts constant + errTooManyRestarts sentinel error (shared by crabInsert and crabDelete); bound crabInsert's retry loop by it.
Bound crabDelete's retry loop by crabMaxRestarts / errTooManyRestarts (defined in insert.go, same package).

Add TestCrabbingRetryCapSurfacesError: force a permanent TryLock miss on a target node (via real lock contention, precedent from TestCrabbingConcurrentPropagateNoDeadlock) for both Insert and Delete paths, assert errTooManyRestarts is returned instead of hanging, bounded by a t.Fatal timeout as a hang-safety net.

Accuracy-only edit to restartFromRootCount's doc comment: crabInsert/crabDelete are now bounded (crabMaxRestarts); Tree.Lookup remains intentionally uncapped. No behavioral change; does not touch NodeStore latch registry / eviction (reserved for 4.5.1.3).

not_touched: engine/btree/lookup.go (4.5.1.4, and Tree.Lookup's own unbounded retry loop is explicitly out of scope for 4.5.1.2)
engine/btree/delete.go spliceOutDegenerateAncestor / NextSibling logic (4.5.1.1, already done)
callers_of_changed_functions: Tree.Insert (insert.go) calls crabInsert -- now may return errTooManyRestarts as a new possible error value; existing callers already handle 'err error' generically, no call site needs updating.
Tree.Delete (delete.go) calls crabDelete -- same: new possible error value, no call site changes needed.

repairEmptyLeaf (delete.go) independently retries on errRestartFromRoot in its own loop calling repairEmptyLeafAtParent -- this is a SEPARATE loop from crabDeleteOnce's own internal descent loop and is NOT crabDelete itself; left unbounded per issue scope (not named in acceptance criteria, not in impacted-modules list beyond delete.go's crabDeleteOnce).
backward_compatibility: errTooManyRestarts is a new sentinel error value; no existing test asserts an unbounded retry count, so no regression expected. crabMaxRestarts=1000 is far above any realistic contention level observed in this package's existing stress tests.
test_impact: New test TestCrabbingRetryCapSurfacesError added to insert_test.go. No existing test modified.
